final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] req,
    output reg [3:0] grant
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            grant <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            grant <= 4'b0000; // Clear grant
            if (req[0]) grant <= 4'b0001; // Grant to req[0]
            else if (req[1]) grant <= 4'b0010; // Grant to req[1]
            else if (req[2]) grant <= 4'b0100; // Grant to req[2]
            else if (req[3]) grant <= 4'b1000; // Grant to req[3]
        end
    end
endmodule
